title: SummerCraft 4 [Fabric]
description: Summercraft 4 is a Minecraft modpack created by a Spanish developer, featuring new biomes, stunning visuals, and unique gameplay to take your summer adventure to the next level. 🌄
body:
#  🌄 Summercraft 4
A vibrant modpack of endless summer, thriving wilderness, and bold adventure.

A lush, visually rich modpack where exploration meets discovery.
Survive, craft, and thrive in a world teeming with life, dynamic biomes, immersive visuals, and expanded systems that reward creativity and exploration.

![Separates text :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b09386a3527c34daa871ce6d3dee122f7e723285.png)

# ☀️ Features‎ 

**🌍 Biomes & Seasons** – Explore vivid and diverse biomes
  
**🌄 Visual Overhaul** – Enhanced lighting, foliage, skies, and shaders for immersive aesthetics
  
**🧭 Adventure-Focused** – Dungeons, ruins, loot, and structures scattered across the world
  
**🎒 Backpacks & Storage** – Portable storage and decorative furniture to store your treasures
  
**🥕 Farming & Cooking** – Grow seasonal crops and cook from a variety of ingredients
  
**🔥 Survival Systems** – Hunger, stamina, and environment-based effects to keep you alert
  
**⚔️ Combat Overhaul** – Fluid combat, weapon variety, and harder mobs as you explore further
  
**🏛️ Base Building** – Use blocks from Chipped, Macaw’s, and more to make your summer home
  
**🧪 Alchemy & Enchanting** – Customize gear and unlock powerful enchantments
  
**🧙🏻‍♂️ Magic & Mystery** – Uncover magical artifacts, lost temples, and ancient puzzles

**☁️ Interactive Weather** – Dynamic storms, heatwaves, snowfall, and fog that affect visibility, mobility, and survival strategies

**🪑 Detailed Decoration** – Furnish your base with hundreds of furniture pieces, ambient lighting, and aesthetic objects to bring your summer home to life

![Separates text :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b09386a3527c34daa871ce6d3dee122f7e723285.png)

# ❓ FAQ

**Q: Is multiplayer supported?**

A: Yes! Summercraft 4 can be played solo or with friends. Server files will be available soon!


_More coming soon :p_


![Separates text :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b09386a3527c34daa871ce6d3dee122f7e723285.png)

### 🌻 Summercraft 4 – Make every adventure feel like summer.

> Made with <3 by Rober
